title: Create: Capsule Corp.
description: Capture, store, and redeploy Sable simulated contraptions using capsules.
body:
Haven't you ever thought, “Man, it would be great if I could just easily transport my little off-road vehicle into the Nether,” or “If only I could easily bring my portable drill onto my airship to go mine a few thousand blocks away”? No? Okay, move along. 

But if transporting all your contraptions is a headache for you, and you don’t know what to do with your five different aircraft models, then this addon is for you. 

## **Features:**

- Use the **Capsule Reader** to scan and capture nearby contraptions.
- Capture named simulated contraptions inside tiered capsules.
- Throw filled capsules to redeploy contraptions anywhere you want.
- Use the **Capsule Wallet** to easily transport your capsules.
- Lots of configuration options available to meet your needs.
- Thanks to the API developed by Rew1nd, retain all the original settings of your contraption.

## **Items and Blocks**

### Capsule Reader

![Capsule Reader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d26c52bcc516524334ac8aa7abd5693415554ee.png)

The **Capsule Reader** is used to capture a simulated contraption.

Place it on the contraption you want to capture, then right-click it with an empty capsule. The contraption must be named before it can be captured.

### Capsules

**Capsules** are used to store captured contraptions.

Available tiers:

- Copper Capsule 
![Copper Capsule](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3830b3d1cdcb5924c834e84bed7b04802bb05401.png)
- Iron Capsule
![Iron Capsule](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf74b88e0c09ceb59bdf1bfddbf7ab0458290ec4.png)
- Gold Capsule
![Gold Capsule](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aae0668254d260aaac448af1f1b6e1f487707420.png)
- Diamond Capsule
![Diamond Capsule](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fedc9e67b47a1842bed8cb1c5a87a0a416d612c7.png)
- Netherite Capsule
![Netherite Capsule](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a608b8869667048705f854aa9fa339c64af10dec.png)

Once filled, a capsule takes the name of the captured contraption.

Throw a filled capsule to redeploy the contraption.

**Capsule Wallet**

![Capsule Wallet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a4be760aa6dd2f369c714c2cd2537dae52ce5f0.png)

The Capsule Wallet can store multiple capsules in a single item. We keep it simple. Max capacity is configurable.

## **Demo**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DEoRRBA851k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## **Configuration**

You can configure:

- capsule capacities
- capsule wallet slots
- capsule throw velocity
- automatic deploy delay
- post-deployment stabilization time
- nearby deployment search radius

Default maximum capsule capacity is currently capped at 8192 blocks to avoid oversized ItemStack NBT and network issues. This is subject to change later !

## **Dependencies**

Required:

NeoForge;
Create;
Sable;
Sable Schematic API by [Rew1nd ](https://modrinth.com/mod/sable-schematic-tool);
LDLib2

/!\ Important : use the sable-schematic-api.jar from my github for it to work (will fix this later) /!\

## **Contributing**

This project is open source and released under the MIT license.

Anyone is welcome to use it, test it, report issues, suggest improvements, or contribute code.

Feedback is especially welcome for:

- Sable compatibility
- large contraption behavior
- deployment edge cases
- multiplayer/server testing
- balancing capsule capacities
